colors.role: ink black: character outlines, UI ink, night glass, deepest interior shadow
shadow mass: under-counter, ceiling corners, dark hair, trouser shadow
mid graphite: trousers, floor grout, TV housing, gray hair shadow
warm concrete gray: worn floor, aged suit gray, ashtray metal, gray hair mid
light warm gray: smoke wisps, dust, plaster shadow edge, gray hair light
cream family deep shade: paper in shadow, plaster shade, apron shadow
cream mid-shade: aged plaster mid, ledger ruling zone, doily/napkin shadow
cream mid-light: upper wall plaster in lamplight, worn paper body
brightest matte value: UI paper panels, lamplit paper, cigarette paper, highlights on cloth
tobacco amber deep: nicotine-stained ceiling shadow, dark tea, bottle glass shadow
amber mid: stained upper walls, lampshade shade side, tea in glass
amber light: pendant light pools on tables/faces, brass fittings, beer
amber glow core: pendant bulbs, filament, brightest warm accent (small areas only)
honey-brown darkest: wood in shadow, counter underside, chair legs
wood shade: table sides, wainscot shade, stool seats
wood mid: varnished tabletops, counter front, door frames
wood highlight: varnish sheen line on counter/table edges under lamps
oxidized teal darkest: service door shadow, painted metal shade, exterior night
teal shade: painted wainscot / column paint, radiator, door body
teal mid: painted surfaces in light, upholstery, enamel signage ground
teal light: chipped-paint highlight, fluorescent-lit painted metal behind counter
dark olive deepest: coat shadow, curtain shadow, plant darks
olive shade: jackets, cardigans, upholstery shade, curtain body
olive light: lamplit side of olive cloth, felt board, plant lights
brick red deep: banner/pennant shadow, dried-blood red, book spines, brick
brick red accent: small emphasis only - pennant, Party card, stamp ink, lit brick
CRT cyan dark: TV screen dim field, phosphor shadow, cold window bounce
CRT cyan mid: broadcast glow body, fluorescent tube cast behind counter
CRT cyan bright: screen highlights, static frames, brightest cool accent (small areas only)
skin shadow: face/hand shade planes, all cast; mix with soot_3 edge for oldest faces
skin mid: base face and hand tone for full cast
skin light: lamplit planes of faces and hands; use sparingly, never full-face
